results.justification: ALiBi per-head linear distance bias with varying slope per head IS the per-category-rate distance-bias mechanism.
Linear recency bias during training covers the per-segment decay attention paradigm.
Bayesian probabilistic positional-bias framework covers distance-attenuated attention with per-position parameters.
Context expansion problem analysis motivates the multi-rate damping remediation.

results.matched_effect_cluster: ACT-R LLM memory base-level decay parameter
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — ACT-R-inspired memory architecture with category-specific decay parameters IS the multi-rate δ_c mechanism.
Proactive-interference characterization of LLM retrieval log-linear decline covers the distance-decay phenomenology.
Turn-based constraint-compliance decay covers the multi-rate context-decay paradigm.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Memory management structured decay long-running agent
results.justification: Structured decay memory management for long-running agents IS the category-conditioned decay paradigm.
